CourtProgress.description: Per-court entry in the seed cursor — how far the backfill has loaded.

offset.description: Rows consumed from this court's bulk stream
offset.title: Offset

total.description: Rows for this court in the snapshot, once the stream ends
total.title: Total

CourtProgress.title: CourtProgress

description:
``config/seed-progress.yaml`` — the resumable seed-backfill cursor.

Git-tracked so the historical backfill is rebuildable after a fresh clone and
a maintainer can read progress in a diff. ``seed-backfill`` reads it at the
start of each run and writes the bumped cursor at the end.

snapshot.description: Bulk snapshot id currently being loaded, e.g. `2026-Q2`
snapshot.title: Snapshot

title: SeedProgress
